title: Simpler Fast Food
description: A mod that adds fast food items to minecraft
body:
Dive into a world of culinary adventures with the **Simpler Fast Food** mod. Bring your favorite fast-food items into the Minecraft world, create ice cream, waffles, and French fries, and even use the handy chopping board to transform bread into buns to make burgers. Perfect for the player who wants to add a tasty twist to their gameplay, this mod provides unique recipes and fun interactions that will make your Minecraft meals unforgettable.
![All items in item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/485a20fc77edce9e512c3a7d9fff7475e0be3375.png)

## How to install?
Getting started with the Simpler Fast Food mod is super simple! All you need is the Fabric API installed—no complicated setups required. For the best experience, we recommend adding the AppleSkin mod (to get more detailed food stats) and ModMenu (to easily manage your mods). Just drop the mod's .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder, and you’re all set to start crafting delicious treats in no time. Enjoy your fast-food-filled Minecraft adventures! 🍟🍦
[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/versions) | 
[ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Unique Foods added:
Craft mouthwatering treats like crispy French fries, delightful waffles, burgers, and refreshing ice cream, all with unique crafting methods. It even includes a functional chopping board to turn bread into buns, paving the way for crafting your own burgers.
- French Fries
- Burger
- Ice Cream
- Waffles
- Tomato Soup
- Taco
- Pizza (Margarita, Cheese and Pepperoni)

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/252ac475ada79b06adb7828dd7bb65b35c2806e9.png)

## Future Plans:
The Simpler Fast Food mod is just getting started! Future updates will introduce more burger variants using the already-added lettuce and tomato crops, giving you the freedom to craft custom creations. But that’s not all—get ready for a wider menu with hotdogs, chicken nuggets, and so much more! The goal is to turn your Minecraft world into the ultimate fast-food paradise, packed with delicious options for every craving. Stay tuned for more tasty updates!
